title: ACPharm Queensland Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: The Therapeutic Goods Administration issued ACPharm Queensland Pty Ltd five infringement notices totalling $99,000, paid October 2025, over alleged unlawful advertising of medicinal cannabis and other therapeutic goods not entered on the Australian Register of Therapeutic Goods.
scope: Paid $99,000 over five TGA infringement notices for alleged unlawful advertising of unregistered therapeutic goods
